description: A bridge washout has closed a main rail line for an extended period. A manager must re-route all affected trains.

nodes.task_description: Log the track outage in the system for a specific segment of the network.

expected_outcome.value: The main line is marked as out-of-service.

nodes.task_description: Identify all trains that were scheduled to use that track segment.

expected_outcome.value: A list of affected trains is generated.

nodes.task_description: For each affected train, find a viable detour route, potentially using trackage rights on another railroad's lines.

expected_outcome.value: New, longer routes are found for all trains.

nodes.task_description: Update the schedule and routing for each train and notify the crews of their new instructions.

expected_outcome.value: All affected trains are re-routed to bypass the outage.
